entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[DQC.US.0201.10701] A value of 8,329,000 is reported for the concept unicoin.com:ReceiptI.e.CollectionOfPrivateCompanyEquitySecuritiesPreviouslyClassifiedAsUnicornHuntersNoncashReceivablesNote5 with in the filing. This element should not be used with a public company filing and should only be used by a private company reporting Form SBSEF. Please remove this fact or consider using a different element to represent the amount.
The properties of this unicoin.com:ReceiptI.e.CollectionOfPrivateCompanyEquitySecuritiesPreviouslyClassifiedAsUnicornHuntersNoncashReceivablesNote5 fact are:
Period :2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
